message:
Hi , hope you're doing well!

I'm Muhammad from Impex Metal Oreasia. We're looking to buy alu foil scrap on CNF Port Mundra basis — do you have anything available or can source it?

Looking for:
• Rotor/Stator
• Alu Cables/ Copper Cables
• Zinc Scores
• Alucubond / Window Blinds
• Transformers
• Food / alu foil
• Champagne & wine foil
• Yogurt foil
• Pharma foil
• Al wheels
• Any other high grade foils

If you have something, please share specs and pictures. Would love to work together 🙏
